title: clematis lingyunensis
intro: Clematis lingyunensis, also known as Clematis chinensis, is a type of flowering vine in the Ranunculaceae family. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Clematis lingyunensis include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, it is often combined with other herbs and used as a decoction or tincture, or applied topically as a cream or ointment.
